content:
INTELLIGENCE BRIEFING — Mon, 16 Feb 2026 20:59:58 GMT
Overall Threat Level: CRITICAL
Total Events: 244 | Critical: 74 | High: 26 | Medium: 21 | Low: 123

CRITICAL ALERTS:
  [AFRICA] Africa Deadliest (GDELT)
  [GLOBAL] Dana Eden , producer of Apple TV series  Tehran , found dead in Greece – The Mercury News (GDELT)
  [NUCLEAR] US Successfully Demonstrates Nuclear Microreactor Airlift - Pakistan Today (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Iran meets UN nuclear watchdog in Geneva ahead of a second round of US talks (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Israeli Strikes Kill 12 in Gaza Amid Ceasefire Violations - Pakistan Today (GDELT)

REGIONAL ASSESSMENT:
  Middle East (57 events, 24 critical, 6 high):
    - Iran meets UN nuclear watchdog in Geneva ahead of a second round of US talks
    - Israeli Strikes Kill 12 in Gaza Amid Ceasefire Violations - Pakistan Today
    - Israeli Strikes Kill at Least Five in Southern , Eastern Lebanon
  Ukraine/Russia (18 events, 4 critical, 2 high):
    - Kim Jong Un moves families of Ukraine war dead into new housing complex
    - Kim Jong-un unveils housing for families of North Koreans killed in Ukraine war
    - Ukrainian slider's Olympics over as helmet appeal dismissed
  Europe (36 events, 16 critical, 3 high):
    - Austrian man faces terror charges over Taylor Swift concert attack plot
    - 'We will discriminate': Elon Musk-backed Restore Britain party launches with hard-right vision
    - Sudan war: Sanctions and donor pledges do not fix the catastrophe on the ground
  Indo-Pacific (33 events, 3 critical, 3 high):
    - North Korea draws new red line, vows attack over future airspace ‘violations’
    - Gilded Capability: Overinvestment and the Survivability Paradox
    - Russia’s Lavrov calls North Koreas nukes the key to its prosperity
  United States (4 events, 1 critical, 2 high):
    - Inside the Strike: The US Munition That Hit a Residential Building in Venezuela
    - US boards second oil tanker in Indian Ocean after it fled Venezuelan raid
    - Pentagon to deploy roughly 200 troops to Nigeria
  Global (74 events, 14 critical, 8 high):
    - Dana Eden , producer of Apple TV series  Tehran , found dead in Greece – The Mercury News
    - Saudi Arabia buys C-27 cargo planes fitted for armed maritime patrols
    - Kenya strike delays flights at international hub airport

Sources: GDELT, NYT World, Middle East Eye, Defense News, Al Jazeera, BBC Europe, BBC Africa, BBC World, NK News, BBC Middle East, The Guardian, Breaking Defense, CISA Advisories, War on the Rocks, Bellingcat, BBC Latin America, The Diplomat, BBC Asia
